text:
### CHAPTER 8 E+W CHARGING ORDER, STOP ORDER, STOP NOTICE


### [ F31 Application for a charging order, stop order or stop notice E+W


33.25. Part 40 applies for the enforcement of a judgment or order made in family proceedings by way of a charging order, stop order or stop notice. ]


Textual Amendments


F31 Rule 33.25 substituted (6.4.2016) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2016 (S.I. 2016/355) , rules 1(2) , 5 (with rule 9 )
